resource.text: At the end of a rainbow, you find a large pot of gold
You discover a hidden treasure chest
A merchant pays you for safe passage
You find gold coins in an abandoned mine
Set up a toll booth on your current space. For the next 3 rounds, any player who passes you pays you 50 Gold.
Set up a toll booth on your current space. Sacrifice 2 Army points to immediately gain 500 Gold.
Establish a connection with a rival kingdom. Choose a player; you both gain 200 Gold, but you cannot attack them for 2 turns.
You mark a spot on the map with an 'X'. Return to your start and reap the rewards.
Your influence over the region grows. Gain 50 Gold for every Territory card you currently own.

army.text: Many young men in your kingdom come of age
A skilled general joins your forces
Draft the strongest soldiers from your rivals.
Issue a challenge to a nearby commander.
Launch a surprise raid on an enemy position.
Focus on training instead of marching.
Bribe the guards of a rival's stronghold.

defense.text: You recruit a young wizard who can help your army become disguised
A new defensive weapon has been developed
Defensive structures that hurt the attacker.
Seal the borders of your kingdom.
Retreat to your most fortified position.
The best defense is a good offense.

fate.text: A new defensive weapon has been developed
A wise advisor joins your court
The stars align and reality shifts.
A desperate alliance is formed in the ruins.
Prosperity reaches every corner of the map.
A glitch in the timeline of the ruins.

penalty.text: Your enemies are able to defeat your systems
You have been banished by the Council.
The value of your currency has tanked.
Your citizens are rebelling against the crown.
Your closest ally has sold your secrets.
The bank is coming for what you owe.
